description_long: This is a classic light machine gun with a prominent round drum magazine mounted on top, a long black metal barrel, and a wooden fixed stock. The weapon features a bipod near the muzzle for stability during firing, and the receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal. The drum magazine is circular and sits horizontally, dominating the central profile of the rifle. The wooden stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a smooth finish and visible grain. The rifle also includes iron sights and a simple cylindrical muzzle, with no additional attachments visible.
description: A light machine gun with a round drum magazine, black metal barrel, and wooden fixed stock, featuring a bipod and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular drum magazine, bipod legs, and the muzzle directly facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the drum magazine, and the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock and the back of the drum magazine, with the bipod legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the rifle, drum magazine, and bipod from the other side.
